tools.name: pages.factchecktoolsPagesDelete
tools.description: Delete all `ClaimReview` markup on a page.

tools.name: pages.factchecktoolsPagesGet
tools.description: Get all `ClaimReview` markup on a page.

tools.name: pages.factchecktoolsPagesList
tools.description: List the `ClaimReview` markup pages for a specific URL or for an organization.

tools.name: pages.factchecktoolsPagesUpdate
tools.description: Update for all `ClaimReview` markup on a page Note that this is a full update. To retain the existing `ClaimReview` markup on a page, first perform a Get operation, then modify the returned markup, and finally call Update with the entire `ClaimReview` markup as the body.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
